user_query:
I’m an Amazon FBA seller planning Q4 inventory. Please read input/skus.csv and input/assumptions.yaml, then calculate weighted daily sales velocity, total lead time (use the Q4 check-in buffer if season is Q4), safety stock (Z=service level from assumptions, with a minimum of 14 days of average daily sales), reorder point, EOQ (with annual holding cost per unit = 12 × monthly storage fee + opportunity cost rate × unit cost), and stock status per SKU. Treat days of stock as (on_hand + in_transit) / adjusted daily sales, and apply each SKU’s seasonal multiplier (or the default from assumptions if a SKU does not specify one). Round reorder points and EOQ to whole units, and round EOQ up to a full case pack multiple. Then write these files:
- output/forecasts/summary.csv — columns: SKU, Daily_Sales_Weighted_Adjusted, Lead_Time_Days, Safety_Stock, Reorder_Point, EOQ, Status, Days_of_Stock
- output/forecasts/B-RED-LG.md, output/forecasts/C-BLU-MD.md, output/forecasts/D-GRN-SM.md — for each SKU, show the full math for weighted velocity, lead time components (including Q4 buffer if applied), safety stock (show both Z-method and 14-day check), reorder point, and EOQ with a sensitivity analysis at ±20% demand (report the rounded EOQ values for low/base/high). Make assumptions explicit.
- output/alerts.md — list any 'URGENT' or 'REORDER NOW' stockout risks and any overstock risks (>180 days of supply). For overstock, include the projected months-of-supply calculation.
- output/reorder-log.md — append one line per SKU where a reorder is recommended (statuses REORDER SOON/REORDER NOW/URGENT), stating the recommended quantity as the EOQ case-pack-rounded amount. Do not include SKUs with status OK.

Data details:
- Use weighted daily sales = 0.5×(30d avg) + 0.3×(60d avg) + 0.2×(90d avg)
- Total lead time = supplier_processing_days + shipping_transit_days + FBA check-in buffer (use 10 days if season is Q4 per assumptions; otherwise 7 days)
- Safety stock = max(Z × daily_demand_stddev × sqrt(lead time), 14 × adjusted daily sales)
- Status rules: OK (days of stock > reorder point days), REORDER SOON (within 14 days of reorder point), REORDER NOW (at/below reorder point), URGENT (days of stock < total lead time)

Please keep paths relative (read from input/, write to output/).
